sourceNotes: Source follow-up pass 53 2026-05-28: Sandee directly names Ayia Triada Beach on Othonoi in the Ionian Islands, supporting identity/location traceability only. Confidence, coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.
